name: Agent Identity Resolved
description: Every agentic action must carry a resolvable AgentID bound to a valid KYA credential (NIST IAL2 human principal).
rationale: FIX Gap 1 / Identity & Authorisation. A Red condition: an action by an agent whose identity cannot be resolved to a verified human principal is an authorisation failure requiring containment.

examples.fails: ToolCall with no resolvable AgentID / KYA

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
